title: scutellaria iskanderi
intro: Scutellaria iskanderi, also known as Iskander's skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria iskanderi include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and have anti-cancer properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Scutellaria iskanderi can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
